title: Program Title (Official)
eligibility_bullets: Bullet 1 (eligibility)
Bullet 2 (eligibility)
how_to_apply: Short steps + link to application page if different from program_url.

title: Premier Lender Program
summary: NJEDA partners with banks to provide loan participations/guarantees and line of credit guarantees to help NJ businesses and nonprofits access capital.
location_notes: New Jersey-based businesses and not-for-profit organizations.
eligibility_bullets: Business in operation at least 2 years
Commit to retention/creation of 1 new full-time job per $65,000 of NJEDA exposure within 2 years
Meet DSCR (1.1x for businesses; 1.0x for nonprofits)
Must secure with fixed assets; home-based businesses are ineligible
how_to_apply: Use the program page and apply via the NJEDA application portal. A financing interest form is also provided on the page.

title: New Jersey Loan Expansion and Network Development (NJ LEND)
summary: 3-year pilot program expanding NJEDA lending capacity; eligible businesses can access up to $5M financing for owner-occupied real estate, equipment, or working capital.
eligibility_bullets: NJ-based business (for-profit: operating ≥2 years; nonprofit: ≥3 years)
No more than 750 employees
Commit to job retention/creation (1 job per $65,000 NJEDA exposure within 2 years)
Home-based businesses are ineligible
Loans must be secured with fixed assets
how_to_apply: Apply via NJEDA application portal; program page includes board memo/specifications and county contacts.

title: Direct Loans
summary: Direct NJEDA loans for NJ businesses needing financing and committed to job creation/retention when conventional financing is not available.
eligibility_bullets: Commit to 1 job per $65,000 NJEDA exposure within 2 years
DSCR requirement (1.1x business; 1.0x nonprofit)
In operation at least 2 years
Must provide fixed asset collateral; home-based businesses are ineligible
how_to_apply: Apply via NJEDA portal linked on the program page.

title: Bond Financing
summary: Conduit tax-exempt (and taxable) bond financing for eligible manufacturing companies, nonprofits, and exempt facilities in New Jersey.
location_notes: New Jersey projects meeting federal tax-exempt bond eligibility criteria.
eligibility_bullets: Eligibility categories include manufacturing/processing, certain utilities, governmental facilities, and 501(c)(3) nonprofits
Applicant must meet Internal Revenue Code requirements for tax-exempt financing
how_to_apply: Apply via NJEDA application portal; consult Authority staff on bond counsel selection.

title: Main Street Micro Business Loan
summary: Provides financing up to $50,000 to eligible NJ micro businesses (≤10 full-time employees; ≤$1.5M annual revenues).
location_notes: New Jersey micro businesses; funding noted as fully subscribed on program page.
eligibility_bullets: ≤10 full-time employees (sole proprietors eligible)
Business location in New Jersey; formed at least 6 months prior to application
Use of funds includes working capital, inventory, and limited equipment purchases
how_to_apply: Program page notes NJEDA is no longer accepting new applications due to full subscription; contact NJEDA Call Center for updates.

title: Small Business Improvement Grant
summary: Reimburses costs for building improvements or purchasing/installing new furniture, fixtures, and equipment (FFE).
location_notes: New Jersey small businesses and nonprofits; rolling basis until funding is exhausted.
eligibility_bullets: Reimbursement up to 50% of eligible costs (cap described on program page)
Minimum project cost $5,000
Applicant must rent or own and operate from the facility being improved
Project must meet timing requirements (commenced and paid within 2 years prior to application date)
how_to_apply: Apply via NJEDA program portal linked on the page; review FAQs and applicant checklist.

title: Small Business Lease Grant
summary: Provides grant funding to cover a portion of lease payments for eligible small businesses and nonprofits leasing new or additional space.
location_notes: New Jersey leases meeting program requirements (market-rate; minimum term; square footage constraints).
eligibility_bullets: Must meet SBA small business definition
Lease must be minimum 5-year term (excluding options)
New leases/extensions/amendments must meet square footage requirements and include street-level space
Applicant must be current on lease payments and provide tax clearance
how_to_apply: Apply via NJEDA program portal linked on the page; review FAQs and applicant checklist.

title: Small Business E-Commerce Support Program
summary: Free e-commerce and digital marketing consulting for eligible NJ small businesses in restaurant, retail, and personal care industries with a commercial location.
location_notes: New Jersey small businesses in specified industries; contact partner consultants directly.
eligibility_bullets: Restaurant, retail, and personal care industries
Operate from a commercial location
Engage NJEDA partner consultants for services (website, online ordering, digital marketing)
how_to_apply: Use the consultant contacts document linked on the program page to reach a partner consultant.

title: Small Business Bonding Readiness Assistance Program
summary: Classes, workshops, and counseling to help small businesses improve readiness for bonding and competing for government contracts.
location_notes: New Jersey businesses; cohorts run through partner chambers.
eligibility_bullets: Comprehensive training on bonding/insurance, financial presentation, construction management, estimating, credit
Participants receive a Bonding Readiness Segment Report
Program offered via partner organizations/cohorts
how_to_apply: Apply via partner chamber links on the program page.

title: NJ Ignite
summary: Rent support grants for early-stage technology and life sciences startups locating in approved collaborative workspaces (program page notes it is closed).
location_notes: New Jersey collaborative workspaces approved by NJEDA.
eligibility_bullets: Early-stage technology and life science companies (see startup qualification checklist)
Rent covered for up to 2, 4, or 6 months with possible bonus months
Workspace must be an approved collaborative workspace (separate qualification process)
how_to_apply: Program page states program is closed; use page resources and contact innovation@njeda.gov for questions.

title: NJ Innovation Evergreen Fund
summary: Co-investment platform that raises capital via corporate tax credit auctions and partners with venture firms to invest in qualified NJ-based early-stage companies.
location_notes: Qualified New Jersey-based companies; co-investment via approved venture firms.
eligibility_bullets: Program partners with approved qualified venture firms to co-invest
Designed to increase venture capital access for NJ-based companies
Companies should be NJ-based and align to program requirements; see FAQs/overview on program page
how_to_apply: Review program overview and contact njief@njeda.com to share non-confidential materials with participating venture firms per page guidance.

title: Brownfields Redevelopment Incentive Program (BRIP)
summary: Project-based transferable tax credit supporting remediation, abatement, and demolition to enable redevelopment of brownfield sites; rules update expected (program not accepting applications per page).
location_notes: New Jersey brownfield sites; award sizing depends on location and eligible remediation costs.
eligibility_bullets: Covers eligible remediation-related costs (investigation/remediation; certain building/structural remedial activities)
Applicant must not be a discharger/party responsible for contamination
Prevailing wage requirements apply; financing gap requirement for some projects
Program page states not currently accepting applications while new rules are developed
how_to_apply: Use eligibility self-assessment tool and sign up for updates; check page for new application release after rules issuance.

title: Emerge Program
summary: Job creation and retention tax credit program under the Economic Recovery Act; provides per-job tax credits for projects investing private capital and creating/retaining good-paying jobs.
location_notes: Projects must be located in an eligible incentive location in New Jersey.
eligibility_bullets: Create at least 35 new full-time jobs (may be lower in some cases)
Located in an eligible incentive location
Meet minimum capital investment requirements and net positive benefit test
Maintain NJ work-time and withholding requirements for incented jobs
how_to_apply: Use program page application process and mapping tool; consult calculator as planning tool; follow NJEDA application guidance.

title: Aspire Program
summary: Gap financing tool supporting commercial, mixed-use, and residential real estate development projects (replaces ERG), providing tax credits for eligible projects in incentive areas.
location_notes: Projects must be in designated incentive areas; program includes cost thresholds and feasibility/gap requirements.
eligibility_bullets: Demonstrate financing gap/below-market return without incentive
Located in designated incentive area
Developer equity participation at least 20% of total cost
Result in net positive benefit to the State
how_to_apply: Apply via Aspire application portal; consultation with Aspire staff is advised (fees non-refundable).

title: Angel Investor Tax Credit Program
summary: Refundable tax credit for investors making qualified investments in NJ emerging technology businesses; base 35% with potential increase to 40% with bonuses.
location_notes: Technology business must be a NJ emerging technology business meeting program criteria.
eligibility_bullets: Technology business employs fewer than 150 employees; at least 75% work in NJ
Investor must submit application within 6 months of investment date (dual investor + company sections)
Eligible technologies include advanced computing/materials, biotech, life sciences, renewable energy, carbon footprint reduction technology, etc.
how_to_apply: Submit online application within 6 months; upload transaction documentation; see fees and mapping tool for bonus geographies.
